summary: Frontend-only Phase 2 verification completed for Friday Mode, Prayer entry point, Hifz weekly planner, Recitation setup flow, version bump surfaces, and route regressions. Requested features loaded and interacted successfully without blocking regressions.
action_items: Optional: standardize additional data-testid coverage for recording-phase controls in RecitationTestPage to improve deterministic e2e automation.
Optional: replace toISOString()-based day keys in Friday reminder logic with local-date keying to avoid potential timezone edge-case mismatches around midnight.
critical_code_review_comments: RecitationTestPage.tsx (~1070 lines) and HifzPage.tsx (~790 lines) exceed maintainable file-size guidance and increase regression risk for future feature changes.
Friday reminder/date keys rely on Date.toISOString(), which uses UTC and can drift from user local day boundaries in some timezones.
Not all interactive controls in Recitation recording/result phases expose data-testid attributes, reducing testability depth.
test_credentials: Missing: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not found (non-auth scope, not blocking this run).
seed_data_creation: LocalStorage updated by feature interactions during run (Friday reminder toggle/salawat/checklist and recitation setup controls).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on http://127.0.0.1:3000. Confirmed Prayer -> Friday entry button, Friday page cards and interactions, Hifz smart+weekly planner card render, Recitation setup controls and setup-to-recording transition via start button, version values in package/changelog files at 3.4.0, and smoke routes /, /azkar, /qibla, /settings, /surah/18, /friday.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional regression reproduced in requested scope. One transient browser runtime crash occurred during automation startup (Playwright Chromium process SIGSEGV) and did not reproduce on immediate retry; subsequent run passed end-to-end for the requested checks.
